decisions.reasoning: Glacial Lance is a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom. Even though Rillaboom outspeeds, Calyrex-Ice survives any hit it can throw, making this the optimal play to secure an immediate advantage.
High Horsepower is a 2HKO on Iron Hands and provides super-effective damage, which is the most efficient way to remove the threat while staying ahead in the exchange.

Glacial Lance is a 2HKO and Iron Hands is currently in range to be finished off quickly. Since I am faster or tied and Iron Hands cannot OHKO me, attacking is the optimal play to maintain momentum and remove the Life Orb threat.

Calyrex-Ice can OHKO Flutter Mane with Glacial Lance. Even though Flutter Mane is faster and might KO Calyrex-Ice with Shadow Ball, securing the KO on the active threat is the priority to prevent further damage and maintain momentum.

Calyrex-Ice is at 31% HP and will be outsped and KO'd by Rillaboom's Wood Hammer. Switching to Incineroar allows me to resist the incoming Grass-type move and pivot safely while preserving Calyrex-Ice for a potential late-game cleanup.
Flare Blitz is a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom, satisfying the primary decision priority to secure a KO when possible.
Rillaboom is at 1% HP and Flare Blitz is a guaranteed OHKO, securing the knockout immediately.
